name: Camas Slipcover Accent Chair Khaki - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Add sophisticated style to your seating ensemble with the Camas Slipcover Accent Chair from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This khaki slipcover accent chair features an upholstered design with removable polyester cushions filled with polyurethane foam for comfortable sitting. The polyester-linen blend slipcover includes side ties for easy attachment to the chair. Made with a rubberwood and plywood frame in a lacquered finish, this accent chair is great for your living area, study room or any other space.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
